creator: cpet@bitchx.org
text:
This is nice it's like reading reddit with people saying the same thing over and over, and think this all started cause I explained why I changed the topic. Also I don't see why we need to be greeted with a Approved after another Approved to approve the approved comment that was previously approved by the current maintainer to approve my email that I sent to approve this PR so koobs can then say approved once again.

I should of been funny and changed the topic to Change MAINTAINER from current MAINTAINER to the new MAINTAINER that should be changed to this MAINTAINER (Add new project MAINTAINER)
